<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Refresh ProjectConfig"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/config/refresh"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Refresh the single ProjectConfig resource in a project's
namespace. Refreshing enqueues the resource for reconciliation
by its corresponding controller.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
